expected: 5D scan price is around RM75-RM148.40, depending on branch and weekday/weekend. For the exact price please check the website or booking page.

input: How much is a gender scan?
expected: Gender scan (2D) is around RM15-RM35, depending on branch and weekday/weekend. Check the website/booking for the exact price.
NT scan is around RM85-RM148.40, depending on branch and weekday/weekend. It is done at 11-13 weeks.

input: How much is an anatomy scan?
expected: Anatomy scan is around RM90-RM175.95, depending on branch and weekday/weekend. Best done at 18-24 weeks.
4D scan is around RM65-RM120.85, depending on branch and weekday/weekend.

input: How much is a KUB scan?
expected: KUB (kidney + bladder) scan is around RM135-RM241.70, depending on branch and weekday/weekend.
Upper abdomen scan is around RM155-RM269.25, depending on branch and weekday/weekend. Fasting at least 8 hours is required.

input: Boleh buat scan pada usia kandungan 4 minggu?
expected: Yes. From 4 weeks onwards pregnancy can be confirmed. You may wait until 8 weeks if you prefer. Below 4 weeks (e.g. 3 weeks) is too early and not accepted yet.

input: Do I need to fast before an upper abdomen scan?
expected: Yes, fasting for at least 8 hours is required for Upper Abdomen and HBS (liver/gallbladder) scans.

input: Do I need a full bladder for a KUB scan?
expected: Yes, a full bladder is needed for Lower Abdomen, KUB, and Full Body scans.

input: Boleh walk-in atau kena buat appointment dulu?
expected: For most scans (for example 5D) you need to book an appointment first; walk-in is generally not guaranteed. Please book online.

input: When is the best time for an anatomy scan?
expected: The anatomy (anomaly) scan is best done at 18-24 weeks. It can still be done at 25-29 weeks but depends on the baby's position and size.
